title: KA KHUAL ZIN NA HIH LEITUNG

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Verse1
Ka khual zinna hih leitungah, haksat na atam hangin,
Ka lamtawp na ah Zeisu in hong ngak cih ka thei hi,
Tua mun ka tun matengin ah, kalsuan in ka paiding hi,
Van kongkhak pan Zeisu'n hongngak,keizong ka nai sem sem.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kumpipa mai kamuh ciang bangzah in a nuam zen tam,
Lungdamna letsong ka sang ding hi,
Leitung ah ka sepna bangin thaman hong kipia ding hi,
Tua hun ciang phawknawn kei na ning, hihleitung haksatnate.
Verse2
kongit u le nau lawm gual te, Hih leitung na nunsung in,
Vantungah na thaman dingin bangzah na kholzo hiam,
Na sepkhiat bang na piakkhiat bang, Topa'n hong thukkik ni ciang
Maizum in na bu kha zaw diam, lungdamin na om zaw diam,
Verse3.
Hih leitung haksatna leh gimna te ih thuak hangin ah,
Phamawh kei hih leitung gimna tomno khat sung bek hi,
Atawntung ka luah ding kham innpi'n hong ngak cih ka theih
Tua manin Topa nasepna, ke'n nuam kasa sem sem.
Tlung lam pan a hong nai kha hang bek hi.
